allow: Bash(which codegraph 2>/dev/null; which code-graph 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; find /home/pax -maxdepth 4 -name "codegraph" -type d 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; find /home/pax -maxdepth 4 -name "code-graph" -type d 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; find /opt -maxdepth 3 -name "*codegraph*" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; find /usr/local -maxdepth 3 -name "*codegraph*" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i codegraph; pip3 list 2>/dev/null | grep -i codegraph; npm list -g 2>/dev/null | grep -i codegraph; echo "---"; pip show codegraph 2>/dev/null; pip3 show codegraph 2>/dev/null; npm list -g code-graph 2>/dev/null | grep -i code)
